messages.content: Shall we test building a project

Hey! 👋 Ready to test a build whenever you are. What would you like to do?

- **Upload a PDF** datasheet to run the full pipeline
- **Pick an existing component** from the library to build around
- **Dry run** with a synthetic datasheet

Just say the word!
Lets Try. Make our first project. Start a new project. Lets see how far we get. Build a test board of an RF amplfier.
